name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem so we can fix it
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behaviour

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- Java version: [e.g. 23]
- Node version: [e.g. 20]
- Browser (for frontend issues): [e.g. Chrome 124]
- Task Manager version / commit SHA:

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
